diff: The documents herein define the periodic monitoring and review responsibilities performed by Core GovOps to ensure that Multisigs remain compliant with the Multisig Security Enforcement Framework and that Multisig documentation and classification remain accurate. These provisions apply only after the effective date specified in [A.2.11.1.3.2 - Multisig Security Guidelines](6033699f-1d55-45ba-8eb1-bd8982571cc0).
